title: EcoMeditation Modifies Brain Resting State Network Activity.

assets.abstract: The tendency of the mind to wander, a characteristic of the brain's default mode network (DMN), correlates with increased unhappiness and self-referential processing and is a deterrent to establishing a consistent meditation practice. The objective of this study was to test the impact of a secular physiological method of meditation. We hypothesized that EcoMeditation would produce increases in neural communication in brain regions associated with compassion and prosociality and decreases in self

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual awareness.
